plan_type_rationale: Two independent deliverables with a hard stop between them. Phase 1 is mechanical and safe; Phase 2 requires reviewing Phase 1 results before committing to an inference strategy.

phases.title: First-Time Header Coverage Pass
phases.goal: Write @coderef-semantic headers into the 1,883 elements that currently have headerStatus=missing. Verify coverage reaches ≥95% defined after a fresh scan.

tasks.description: populate-coderef --source-headers (no --overwrite) against coderef-core — writes headers only to files with no existing @coderef-semantic block
populate-coderef --mode minimal to refresh index.json after header write
Verify headerStatus distribution: defined ≥ 95% of total elements, stale = 0
Commit the newly written source headers and updated .coderef/ index
Hard stop — report Phase 1 coverage numbers before proceeding to layer seeding

acceptance_criteria: headerStatus=missing count drops from 1,883 to ≤ 125 (≤5% of 2,426 elements)
No source files corrupted (vitest suite still passes)

phases.title: Path-Inference Layer/Capability Seeding
phases.goal: Implement path-based @layer and @capability inference in header-generator.ts so files with no prior annotation get meaningful tags on the next --source-headers --overwrite pass. Verify layer coverage improves to ≥60%.

tasks.description: Read STANDARDS/layers.json to get the canonical layer enum and design the path-pattern → layer mapping table

Add inferLayerFromPath(filePath: string): string | undefined to header-generator.ts — ordered match table: src/cli/ → cli, src/pipeline/ → pipeline, src/scanner/ → scanner, src/integration/ → integration, src/semantic/ → semantic, __tests__/ → test_support, scripts/ → utility, src/utils/ → utility, src/ → service (fallback)
Add inferCapabilityFromPath(filePath: string, elementName: string): string | undefined — kebab-case slug from filename stem + element name suffix
Wire inferLayerFromPath and inferCapabilityFromPath into generateHeadersFromElements — use inferred values only when element.layer/capability are undefined
npm run build to compile changes
Run vitest suite to confirm no regressions
populate-coderef --source-headers --overwrite-headers to apply inferred layer/capability to all files
Verify layer coverage: elements with layer ≥ 60% of total (target: ≥1,456 of 2,426)
Commit path-inference logic and refreshed headers

acceptance_criteria: inferLayerFromPath covers all major src/ subdirectory patterns
Layer coverage ≥ 60% of elements in index.json
No hardcoded layer values — all inferred from STANDARDS/layers.json enum
vitest suite passes (1 known flaky timeout excluded)
header-generator.ts does not corrupt any source file on --overwrite pass
